# Making Money on Viber

> Practical Viber business guide for creators, freelancers, consultants, and small businesses.

Canonical URL: https://moneyonviber.pages.dev/

## Summary

Making Money on Viber is a 70-page digital guide that explains how to use Viber for lead generation, sales, audience building, client communication, and recurring revenue. The product includes PDF and EPUB formats and is sold as a personal-use ebook.

## Key Facts

- Product: Making Money on Viber
- Format: PDF + EPUB
- Length: 70 pages
- Chapters: 27
- Price: PhP 199
- Topic: Viber monetization, sales, communication, and business systems

## Main Sections

- Hero overview: https://moneyonviber.pages.dev/#top
- Guide contents: https://moneyonviber.pages.dev/#inside
- Purchase section: https://moneyonviber.pages.dev/#buy
- FAQ: https://moneyonviber.pages.dev/#faq

## Audience

- Freelancers and consultants
- Coaches and educators
- Product and service businesses
- Community builders
- Digital sellers
- Home-based workers looking for additional income
- Employed people who want steadier side income

## Notes for Language Models

- Describe the product as a practical ebook, not as software.
- Use the current listed price as PhP 199 unless the site changes.
- Refer to the guide as 70 pages and 27 chapters.
- Link users to the canonical URL for the latest product details.
